rationale: Gov't Code §2306.180 grants general authority to encourage home ownership among low/moderate income families. It sets no dollar thresholds or homestead exemption amounts, so increasing the §11.13(b) exemption does not conflict.
quote: The department may encourage individual or cooperative home ownership among individuals and families of low and very low income and families of moderate income.
_note: No direct conflict; §2306.180 is a general authority provision with no specific dollar figures or exemption parameters that the proposed change would contradict.
